form.formComment: Improved last start with a solid effort when 2nd (10m Fr2) over 2138m at this track beaten 2.25 m by Phoebe Majestic (2:44.00) in 3yo+ NR up to 55 on March 31 at $3.50. Progressing well. Top chance in this line-up.

form.formComment: Last start 7th (20m Fr6) over 2138m at this track well beaten by No Remorse (2:43.00) in 3yo+ NR up to 45 on March 13 at $6.50. form.formComment: Last start and went on to finish a respectable fourth over 2138m at this track last start. Before that, was well back in the run when 7th (Fr7) over 2138m after racing wide at this track beaten 11 m by Nellie Joy (2:36.70) in 3yo+ NR up to 55 on March 24 at $5.50. Ready to find his best.

form.formComment: Lines up again after a break of four months. Well beaten at the end of his last preparation at this course and distance when seventh unwanted in the market behind Sassy Galleon. Might need this run and others rate better.
